title: Telegram AI Bot SaaS Template
description: Full-stack Telegram bot template with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, admin panel, and SQLite.
longDescription: A production-ready Telegram bot template that integrates OpenAI, Telegraf, and SQLite so you can deploy a monetizable bot fast.

title: Cursor Rules Pack for Node.js + TypeScript
description: Professional Cursor AI rules for Node.js + TypeScript projects.
longDescription: Curated Cursor rules for Node.js and TypeScript backends — structure, testing hints, and DX defaults.

title: Incident Brief
description: Converts raw system logs into concise incident updates for teams.
longDescription: A Next.js tool that turns logs and errors into clear briefs for Slack or tickets.

title: Personal Portfolio & Blog
description: This site — Next.js portfolio with blog, CMS, and admin.
longDescription: Built with Next.js 16 and Tailwind. File-based CMS, blog, newsletter, analytics, and admin panel.
